title: ServerConfig derives Debug, leaks secret_key
description: In smallhold src/config.rs, ServerConfig at line 43 derives Debug and contains pub secret_key: String. If the config struct is ever logged (e.g. tracing::debug!(?config, ...)), the secret key will appear in plaintext in logs. Fix: implement Debug manually to redact secret_key, or use a wrapper type like secrecy::SecretString.
